name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Twenty-six
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
Anything you pitch in goes a very long way.
|
---

| | In this post-_Citizens United_ political era, where special interest groups can spend millions of dollars from undisclosed donors to influence our elections, it might not seem like small-dollar contributions can make a big difference. But Peter, look at all we've done with an [**average online contribution of just $26:**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb7/2538127391/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26")
* Won re-election in a state Trump won by almost ten points.
* Built a powerful movement ready to take action at a moment's notice.
* Fought -- together -- for policies that will restore the dignity of work in Washington.

We're a little behind our goal right now. **So by Tuesday, February 26th, we're looking for 450 supporters to match our $26 average online contribution.[Will you be one of them?](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb7/2538127391/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb6/2538127391/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe190224_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb6/2538127391/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe190224_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb6/2538127391/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe190224_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb5/2538127391/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Every time you [**give $26**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb7/2538127391/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26"), you're not only supporting me. You're supporting the shared values we are all fighting for. Every [**$26 contribution**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb7/2538127391/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26") represents another voice in the fight for a country where anyone who works full-time takes home a paycheck that actually covers their bills. It represents another voice in the fight to expand access to healthcare, protect Medicare and Social Security, and end the influence of outside groups in our elections. I know we ask a lot of you, Peter. But your contributions are so important -- they fund our outreach and organizing efforts. [**So if you can, be one of the 450 supporters we need to match our $26 average online contribution by the 26th (Tuesday).**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb7/2538127391/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26") With immense gratitude, Sherrod P.S.: If you can't give $26, that's ok. Even [**a contribution of $3 or $1**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb5/2538127391/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjI0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190224?refcode=sbe190224_m_other&refcode2=3268183") would get us closer to our February goal. Thanks for your support.
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc3b/4462dc26/8d947105/201edbb4/2538127391/VEsP/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I hope we get to meet in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Special opportunity for you. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ad12d9598d84966db4de538ee9ea0b58b56eb883f0e7c6f80dd925b34739c4ea38b9c6de6ef621d4e44918f93fea800b76ef6a5736d0e12)
---

Friend,

I want you to enter for the chance to meet me for a breakfast I'll be hosting in Florida.

This is the very FIRST opportunity to win breakfast with me for the 2020 re-elect campaign, and as one of our top supporters, I wanted to make sure you got the invite first.

**If you win, we 'll cover your flight, hotel stay, and the meal. You can even bring a friend or family member and we'll all take a picture together so that we can all remember this moment forever.**

---
| _All it takes is any contribution of at least $3 before March 4th at 11:59 PM to be automatically entered for this once-in-a-lifetime chance ..._
**[BREAKFAST WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227b18d0b9fb1754dea1484e02565f2c582e4a0b6cc465c68f342423b654799db950197caaa07b13024d9f63c0e2c4b2b995)** **SUPPORTER: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227bef1d072bec3d6966155d1c20e2cbbcc00fe8e35a3e5365c5237df070f747b6dbc50446dadd6e1c6871d789bd26c3d7f9)** **ENTRY:****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: March 4th at 11:59 PM** ************************************[ **CONTRIBUTE $3**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227b654ca5ba1d8a76e65eb3bf07ef4558a49cecef44d325cebaf5e545deb7a133d876d2340194616d7013a848e9c4520cd7)************************************
** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227be62aa6f3cb953c0c4a7e8fdc6179ee3322eb0072eacdfcbdfea95ed560f81104dbe6ce0532b2470dd51cbec3e3fdf102)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227b87e159443ae0fa58599881f1f50e47a3d48edb6d5373a1662d15d021a0ad9cf13f557336f917d6c406ed0d8db7bf4cc3)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227b526be339d69f6ab3492039110ba94cf089e158cf2541f3e06f8b5e7233a6bb53ad3924b701e9548b331e10cd6c7f478c)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227b26b10708652b1613757659e3914f8e61729920238b319ee29927d506e80b4eb58292ba470a2f0844f8b64b5033bb16ac)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227ba28a53e79e4da26ec9d870473d0d6aa98e52a23062cf80c25da8edbdb619c23a9b74dd0daca43d0cf4928f29633e3ae9)**
This is the greatest part about being president.

**I love getting to meet the people who truly are the heart and soul of our beautiful nation. You are my motivation to keep fighting to Make America Great Again!**

I hope we get to meet in Florida.

**[Please contribute at least $3 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227bd9fb08edf745c79e8d817c702618a2de5008253307cbce9b6dfcfdeab1e35dcbbda209608a0c063809572afd07edd480)**

Thank you,
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227b964dde92bab7918a5dc5e650e4231d0aa81be8bcab60e88d38c9d87c1275c13a68fcdfeb1d5ec5abe28046563126fbb3)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States of America

[CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea3f07dc3c8227bccfec438ad20506cfe46c42119e46495459f9fdb679aee6baffa30c488c9bfcfbaa39348cd540590844a049b27a6da03)
---

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. **NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ad12d9598d849664ab5ca1d9ca82d30a9665e623995a6920b058c9080bdc8b7a0fac73c357d63bfd7e06f663bdfe7506763b8b1b55b062e) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ad12d9598d8496631defa62edcf94397a208e7cba1450c3b7263b43a16be3455ad57e161a6e490bed587a5b65249bcefad35b97b2807c6b) or by texting “FEBBREAKFAST” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between Feb 23, 2019, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on March 4, 2019, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to a breakfast event featuring President Donald J. Trump (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ad12d9598d84966815ebe32b9ed0c22a945f8b3f50cb8b355dc93d58864ae041b142360d68fdd2628c8f1db76ed7e8e7700943f5c56da9e) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ad12d9598d84966161a742fc8b9b8d9c827443fdf1ee822187eea5bf93d173534b79a6f7bcc2de1dd5e4747c0f607e8bc1468d4b94d66e7) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc948c0e7d53368cf472b5b1366d16cc73dfafc68086420c5f99d748e1e02f6166b73ce4e6b1ff9cceee13e629ecd928ceeffc7417b99c3e14) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c6d26b2bd1a1d32feb38869880bdd385c4fedcdba932ba7f72f429e370991aed57a11ca8c9f098a25)
---

name: Jason Yates
subject: Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act
body:
| | Please act NOW: Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act and contact your Senators now!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ChoLRUtb0vrdfodIM5dSpWEKm40jtMvPqFz_ao36_h0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=1)
| Peter, In recent days, Christians have watched helplessly as liberal lawmakers across the country have aggressively pushed to protect and expand abortion access. Millions were shocked beyond belief to hear lawmakers even advocating for post-birth abortion — infanticide! That’s why the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act is the most important piece of legislation in a generation. The bill would guarantee that any child born alive in the context of an abortion would be provided full legal protection as a living human being and that medical treatment must be provided to attempt to save the child’s life. There is currently no federal law which requires medical professionals to provide treatment for children born alive after attempted abortions. The Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act (Senate bill S.311) is scheduled for a floor vote this afternoon. [Please ACT NOW](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ChoLRUtb0vrdfodIM5dSpWEKm40jtMvPqFz_ao36_h0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=2)! Christians must urge every single U.S. Senator to loudly reject the barbarism of infanticide and support the Born-Alive bill. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ChoLRUtb0vrdfodIM5dSpWEKm40jtMvPqFz_ao36_h0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190225p2a01&n=8)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Wall footage attached 📎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The Wall is under construction RIGHT NOW. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=944f5a83bcd0caa33296e0934e09a03d63d26f2bd4f51b197f521f562cfd23a0b9273f23cbd387afcf0127c44b9e60a0329c2c3e715000a5)
---

Friend,

Since the day I announced my Presidential run, the mainstream media has told the American people that the wall would never be built.

In 2016, Barack Obama, mocked the idea of building the wall and said, "Good luck with that."

And now Nancy Pelosi and her liberal con-artists are doing everything they can to obstruct the completion of the wall.

Well I have some BREAKING NEWS for all of them:

**_THE WALL IS UNDER CONSTRUCTION RIGHT NOW AND IT IS BEAUTIFUL._**

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=944f5a83bcd0caa3da35a9ae62ace78210e8e2491dbdd0eda598a61c48bd95a4c395834c0bfec6ebcb66e25e7e40889729901aaffd000f69)
We're so close to reaching our ambitious goal of raising $2,000,000 to make a statement to Democrats to FINISH THE WALL. That's why I'm calling on you, Friend to put us over the top. This is your moment to make a statement, it's in your hands now.

DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT**

We are building the wall for the safety of Americans because as long as I am your Commander-In-Chief, you will ALWAYS come before illegal immigrants.

Help us CRUSH our goal and FINISH THE WALL.

**[Please make a special contribution by 11:59 PM EST to show you want to FINISH THE WALL and your donation will be instantly QUADRUPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8306c7f0eb1b77ff20b14ea9806e37307d7c3a49a8784c505b5f9e8ad5c61979efc356fd30477a581eeca06905aeb7c0f22d1dcc76753d70)**

name: Team Beto
subject: quick favor [Beto’s Survey]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
As many of you know, Beto and Amy have been looking at ways they can best
serve our country going forward. To see what role they can play in uniting
a country that’s as divided as we’ve ever seen it.

But these decisions deserve careful thinking, which is why Beto has been
asking important questions and taking plenty of time to listen. He has
been on the road to visit states across the country, holding meetings with
students, and trying to listen to as many people as possible so he can
gain their perspective, learn from their experiences, and get the benefit
of their wisdom.

As part of this process, we need to hear from you and all of the people
who supported our campaign for Senate in Texas. You uniquely know Beto and
you know our grassroots campaign, what we fought for, the positive,
inclusive, ambitious way we fought for it. With that understanding, you
have the best perspective on this. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/survey/?t=1001&akid=24951%2E444211%2E7mmran ]If you’ll take just a second to tell
us your thoughts on the issues that are most important to you, it would
mean the world to Beto.

Take the survey »

Beto wants to make sure that he’s listening to everyone — not just those
that he knows in El Paso and in Texas. Everyone. Especially the people
from places that are forgotten or overlooked. The towns that have not been
visited enough, or are only thought about when it comes to election time.

Amy and Beto are making decisions about next steps. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/survey/?t=1002&akid=24951%2E444211%2E7mmran ]But before they do
that, we really need to hear from all of you reading these emails -- to
learn about what matters most to you.

Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us today. We’ll get them over to
Beto and Amy.

-Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20190225footer&t=1003&refcode2=24951_444211_7mmran&akid=24951%2E444211%2E7mmran

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=24951%2E444211%2E7mmran

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us today. We’ll get them over to Beto and Amy. -Team Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Delays China Tariff Hike, Announces Xi Summit, Citing ‘Substantial Progress’ in Trade Talks
body:
"President Trump announced Sunday that he would hold off on implementing planned tariff hikes on hundreds of goods." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0be7fb4056&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# President **Trump Delays China Tariff Hike, Announces Xi Summit, Citing ‘Substantial Progress’ in Trade Talks**

“President Trump announced Sunday that he would hold off on implementing planned tariff hikes on hundreds of goods imported from China, citing ‘substantial progress’ in high-level trade talks between the two nations,” Samuel Chamberlain reports for Fox News.

President Trump tweeted that he will be planning a summit meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Florida. On Friday, Chinese leaders committed to buying an additional 10 million metric tons of U.S. soybeans. President Trump’s trade “strategy is working,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue wrote on Twitter.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd4a48ae71&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “With his stirring repudiation of socialism, both at home and abroad, President Trump is proving himself to be the very champion of liberty and freedom the world needs,” former executive Andy Puzder writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1249607728&e=3ee4985eea). “No American president since Ronald Reagan has confronted the evils of socialism as forcefully as Trump is doing today by supporting the people of Venezuela as they retake their country from the corrupt socialist dictatorship of disputed president Nicolas Maduro.”
---
|
---
| “It is time for Congress to join the president in his commitment to cutting spending, reducing bloated deficits, and getting our national debt under control. America’s future generations are depending on them,” Acting White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russ Vought writes in _[RealClearPolitics](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac32061fc2&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Time and again, Congress has ignored presidential cost-saving recommendations and plowed ahead with irresponsible budgets that increase both spending and the size of government. This needs to stop.”
---
|
---
| In the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0037208efe&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Paul Bedard reports that suburban women are supporting President Trump—and the big reason is that many want a border wall. “A remarkable new Zogby Analytics poll found that suburban women, more than likely voters, support the wall and Trump’s emergency declaration that will allow him to spend more to build it than Congress has OK’d. The numbers: 45 percent of suburban women want the president to find other sources of money to build the border wall, versus 40 percent who don’t. And 50 percent back his emergency declaration.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9afb2b4cf4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f2b09b2b1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=22e3d6f1e2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

President Trump tweeted that he will be planning a summit meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Florida. On Friday, Chinese leaders committed to buying an additional 10 million metric tons of U.S. soybeans. name: Kamala Harris
subject: An important request for You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
The field of Democratic candidates is growing by the day, and the record-breaking fundraising from my friends in this race has been impressive to watch. It means grassroots donors are tuned in and excited about the campaigns we’re running. **But it also means we face some extraordinary odds in the primaries.** Now, according to my team, we are behind on our goal of raising $500,000 online by the end of this month. I wish I had better news, because I’ll be honest: this is not where I was hoping to be just days away from our February fundraising deadline. If we are going to hold our own in this primary, we need to catch back up on our goal -- quickly. So I am asking you personally: **Can you rush a donation to my campaign for President of the United States ahead of Thursday’s end-of-month deadline? With the field of candidates in this race growing like never before, we cannot afford to fall short right now. Help us build our campaign when it matters most:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=2&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
---
| | [Chip in $50 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=3&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
---
| | [Chip in $250 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=5&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
---
| [Another Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&t=6&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
---
Getting our positive message out to as many voters as possible will be difficult and it’s going to take significant resources. And the choices we make in these early months will set the pace for the rest of our campaign.
As you may know, I am not taking a dime from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists -- which means our grassroots donors are an increasingly big part of how we raise money. That’s exactly why we have the momentum -- and why I am asking you to show your support early:
**[If you are with me in this campaign, will you chip in a donation today? We are just a few days away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we need the resources to continue building our grassroots movement in the coming months.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1902-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190225-full&t=7&refcode2=3242_5755789_qOKE4w&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)
**
With your support, I know we can keep our momentum going strong -- but it's going to take a commitment from each of us to make it happen. If we each accept that responsibility, this can be the start of something truly historic.
Thanks for everything you do.
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list.
You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3242%2E5755789%2EqOKE4w)

name: Jeff Weaver, BernieSanders.com
subject: (no subject)
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=624%2E150750%2E-42Rdo)

Hey again. Jeff Weaver here. Bernie’s campaign manager on the 2016 campaign and a top counselor on this one.
I’m writing because in a few hours, Bernie is going on CNN for an hour-long televised town hall. And when that happens, we want to be able to say two things:
1. That more than one million people have signed up to join our campaign. Check. We’ve done that. And:
2. That we’ve hit an ambitious online fundraising goal for the first week of our campaign from lots of people giving small amounts of money.

We haven’t hit that second goal yet. But we’re close. So close that you could be the one that puts us over the top. What do you say? You can use this link:
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/first-week**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8916?refcode=em190225-2-120-full&t=2&akid=624%2E150750%2E-42Rdo)
If you could add your first contribution to our campaign today, it’d make a huge difference.
All my best,
Jeff

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [unsubscribe using this link](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=624%2E150750%2E-42Rdo). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=624_150750_-42Rdo&akid=624%2E150750%2E-42Rdo).
